chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1530 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 3. For hearing of MA 13078/16 24.10.2016. Mr. Sanaullah Khoso, Advocate for petitioner. Ms. Shaista Shah, State Counsel alongwith SIP Manzoor Ali on bhelaf of SSP Hyderabad. -.-.-. None present for private respondents. According to learned State Counsel, petitioner shall be provided police protection provided he approaches respondent No.2. She further submits that according to statement filed by respondent No.4 (SHO P.S Kazi Ahmed), the private respondents are absconding in Crime No. 194/2016 and respondent No.5 Kirshan Thakur is already behind bar. The petitioner’s counsel submits that if police, according to its comments, provide adequate protection he will not press the instant petition. Order accordingly. Official respondents are directed to provide protection to petitioner whenever he approaches them with such a request, but strictly in accordance with law and relevant rules. This Constitutional Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
